eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Minnesota; at 01:22 PM ON APR 29, 2026 Effective until 02:22 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a coordinated TEST of the broadcast stations in your area and Emergency Management. We are testing equipment that can quickly warn you during emergencies. If this had been an actual emergency such as a tornado. Official messages would have followed the alert tone. This concludes this test of the Emergency Alert System. No Action Required
